name: preuser
description: Set up preuser on a repo. /preuser:setup interviews you and drafts a .preuser/config.yml target — sandbox, static URL, or post-deploy GitHub Deployment URL — plus natural-language journeys an AI user walks once per PR. /preuser:seal encrypts a login credential so you commit only ciphertext. Draft-then-confirm; never writes a raw secret; never pushes without your say-so.
